mapper.select: SELECT plan_no, user_uuid, day_of_week, title, color, start_time, end_time, created_at FROM week_plans WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} ORDER BY day_of_week ASC, start_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO week_plans (user_uuid, day_of_week, title, color, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{userUuid}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{title}, #{color}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
